'''''SPFX: The Empire Strikes Back''''' is a [[1980]] documentary on the making of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].

On [[September 22]], 1980, it was broadcast on [[Wikipedia:Chicago|Chicago's]] [[Wikipedia:WBBM-TV|WBBM-TV]] television channel.<ref name="Chicago">{{YouTube|video=y4o4-iBt1n4|text=SP FX: The Empire Strikes Back - WBBM-TV (Complete Broadcast, 9/22/1980) 📺|channel=@FuzzyMemoriesTV|name=The Museum of Classic Chicago Television (www.FuzzyMemories.TV)}}</ref>

In 1981, it was issued to video by Magnetic Video as a Laserdisc exclusive, before being released a year later by 20th Century Fox Video on VHS, Betamax, CED, and Laserdisc as part of a double feature with the 1977 ''[[The Making of Star Wars]]'' and was later reissued as a triple feature with ''The Making of Star Wars'' and the 1983 special ''[[Classic Creatures: Return of the Jedi]]''. It was also included in the ''Star Wars'' saga Blu-ray box set released in [[2011]].<ref name="TFNSWBD">{{WebCite|url=http://theforce.net/latestnews/story/MTFBWY_SW_BluRay_Details_Released_137998.asp|text=MTFBWY: SW Blu-Ray Details Released|author=Geller, Eric|date=2011-05-04|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20190730154757}}</ref>
